content: ੴਸਤਿਨਾਮੁਕਰਤਾਪੁਰਖੁਨਿਰਭਉਨਿਰਵੈਰੁਅਕਾਲਮੂਰਤਿਅਜੂਨੀਸੈਭੰਗੁਰਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ॥ Hi, it's Prabhchintan Randhawa from Austin,Texas. This is an open-source notebook. I will add to it gradually. Do subscribe if you want to hear from me time to time, I will rarely email you.
